content.name: Weather Forecast Service
content.summary: Enhanced weather information with validation, error handling, and comprehensive analysis.
content.description: Provides current conditions, 7-day forecasts, hourly predictions, weather alerts, and lifestyle recommendations. Supports both metric and imperial units with multi-language location parsing.

params.location: City or region name for weather query
params.units: Temperature unit preference: metric (Celsius) or imperial (Fahrenheit)

content.system_prompt: ALWAYS identify the specific location (city/region) before fetching data. If location is not clear, ask for clarification. Include current conditions and a 7-day forecast if available. CRITICAL: Validate all data before presenting to user. Support both metric (Celsius) and imperial (Fahrenheit) units.

start.step1: Receive user input with location query

validate_location.step1: Validate city name (support Chinese and English)
validate_location.step2: Handle fuzzy queries (e.g., 'Beijing' vs 'Beijing City', 'NYC' -> 'New York')
validate_location.step3: Recognize common aliases and abbreviations (e.g., 'LA' -> 'Los Angeles')
validate_location.step4: If location is ambiguous, ask user for confirmation

geocode.step1: Use google_search to find coordinates or verify city name.
geocode.step2: Get standardized city name and country/region info
geocode.step3: Record geographic location for subsequent queries

unit_pref.step1: Detect user unit preference (identify C/F keywords from query)
unit_pref.step2: Default to Celsius but provide dual-unit display
unit_pref.step3: Convert wind speed (km/h vs mph) and pressure (hPa vs inHg)

fetch.step1: Use web_search to retrieve current temperature, humidity, wind speed, and conditions.
fetch.step2: Fetch 7-day forecast with high/low temperatures and precipitation probability.
fetch.step4: Verify data completeness - if missing critical fields, flag for user.
fetch.step5: Fallback data source switching mechanism (switch when primary fails)

error_handler.step1: Retry 3 times on API failure, then switch to backup data source
error_handler.step2: Prompt user and explain missing items when data is incomplete
error_handler.step3: Give friendly prompt on network timeout and provide offline suggestions
error_handler.step4: Suggest similar city names when city does not exist

analyze.step1: Check for severe weather alerts or significant temperature changes.
analyze.step3: Check air quality index (AQI) and UV index if available.
analyze.step4: Historical comparison: compare with historical average temperature for same period

enhanced_report.step1: Format the findings into a user-friendly report with icons/emojis.
enhanced_report.step2: Structure: Location + Current Conditions + 7-Day Forecast + Alerts.
enhanced_report.step4: Lifestyle indices: car wash, exercise, cold risk, UV, clothing suggestions
enhanced_report.step5: Travel advice: recommend activities and precautions based on weather
